---
title: "Publications"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: cosmo
---

<style>
body {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg,#08131d 0%,#0d1f2b 100%) !important;
}

h1, h2, h3, p, li {
  color: rgba(222,238,246,0.92);
}

h2, h3 {
  color: #ffffff;
}

a {
  color: #7ecce6;
}

.pub-card {
  padding: 1.15rem 1.4rem;
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: rgba(15,31,45,0.55);
  border: 1px solid rgba(126,204,230,0.14);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  transition: 0.2s ease;
}

.pub-card:hover {
  border-color: rgba(126,204,230,0.30);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.pub-authors {
  color: rgba(200,227,239,0.80);
  font-size: 0.93rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}

.pub-authors strong {
  color: #7ecce6;
}

.pub-title {
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}

.pub-venue {
  color: rgba(190,220,235,0.82);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-style: italic;
}

.pub-links {
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
}

.pub-link {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: rgba(126,204,230,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(126,204,230,0.25);
  color: #7ecce6 !important;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  margin-right: 6px;
  transition: 0.2s ease;
}

.pub-link:hover {
  background: rgba(126,204,230,0.22);
  border-color: rgba(126,204,230,0.45);
}

.status-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-left: 8px;
}

.badge-review {
  background: rgba(255,180,50,0.15);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,180,50,0.30);
  color: #f5c865;
}

.badge-prep {
  background: rgba(126,204,230,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(126,204,230,0.25);
  color: #7ecce6;
}

.section-divider {
  height: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(126,204,230,0.25), transparent);
  margin: 28px 0;
}
</style>

## Peer-Reviewed Articles

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-authors}
Swannack, T. M., Cushway, K. C., Carrillo, C. C., Calvo, C., Determan, K. R., Mierzejewski, C. M., **Quintana, V. M.**, Riggins, C. L., Sams, M. D., & Wadsworth, W. E. (2025).
:::

::: {.pub-title}
Cracking the code: Linking good modeling and coding practices for new ecological modelers.
:::

::: {.pub-venue}
*Ecological Modelling, 499, 110926.*
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ecolmodel.2024.110926){.pub-link}
:::
:::

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-authors}
**Mahan, V.**, ten Brink, T., & Johnsen, P. (2022).
:::

::: {.pub-title}
Guidance for integrating GIS analyses into ESA Section 7 federal consultations.
:::

::: {.pub-venue}
*NOAA Fisheries Policy Series [22-03].*
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[Report](https://www.greateratlantic.fisheries.noaa.gov/policyseries){.pub-link}
:::
:::

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-authors}
McKay, S. K., **Mahan, V.**, Dougherty, M. P., Swannack, T. M., Hall, C., Saltus, C. L., Reif, M. K., & Allen, S. (2022).
:::

::: {.pub-title}
New York Bight Ecological Model (NYBEM), Version 1.0.0.
:::

::: {.pub-venue}
*U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center.*
:::
:::

::: {.section-divider}
:::

## Manuscripts in Review

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-authors}
Menichino, G., **Quintana, V.**, Wiest, S., Mierzejewski, C., & Schwartz, B. (2025, in review).
:::

::: {.pub-title}
Hyporheic Exchange (HYPE) Tool: Automated hyporheic hydraulics modeling in rivers using Python. [In Review]{.status-badge .badge-review}
:::
:::

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-authors}
U.S. Army Corps of Engineers & Wampanoag Tribe of Gay Head (Aquinnah). (2025, in review).
:::

::: {.pub-title}
Environmental Resource Management Study in Aquinnah, Massachusetts. [In Review]{.status-badge .badge-review}
:::
:::

::: {.section-divider}
:::

## In Preparation

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-title}
Hydrodynamic regimes as drivers of material and contaminant transport in estuaries. [In Prep]{.status-badge .badge-prep}
:::

::: {.pub-authors}
**Quintana, V. M.**
:::
:::

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-title}
Behavioral mediation of mercury exposure risk in anadromous fish. [In Prep]{.status-badge .badge-prep}
:::

::: {.pub-authors}
**Quintana, V. M.**
:::
:::

::: {.section-divider}
:::

## Software & Technical Products

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-authors}
**Quintana, V. M.** (2025).
:::

::: {.pub-title}
Mercury Risk Explorer [Interactive application].
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[Launch App](https://vkzfr3-vanessa-mahan.shinyapps.io/Mercury_Risk_Explorer){.pub-link}
:::
:::

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-authors}
**Quintana, V. M.** (2025).
:::

::: {.pub-title}
GoFish: A toolkit for modeling migratory fish and environmental risk [Software].
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[Documentation](https://vmahan1998.github.io/GoFish){.pub-link}
:::
:::

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-authors}
**Quintana, V. M.** & Menichino, G. (2025).
:::

::: {.pub-title}
HyporheicFloPy [Python software].
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[Documentation](https://usace-wrises.github.io/HyporheicFloPy){.pub-link}
:::
:::

::: {.pub-card}
::: {.pub-authors}
**Quintana, V. M.** (2024).
:::

::: {.pub-title}
River Herring Habitat Model [Habitat suitability model].
:::

::: {.pub-links}
[GitHub](https://github.com/vmahan1998/RiverHerringHabitatModel_TechReport){.pub-link}
:::
:::
